Navigation.menuDescription: Mobile navigation, language, and media controls.

Home.title: Creative + Developer.
Home.subtitle: Software, games, visual systems. Built deliberately from Ontario — one archive across engineering, art, and writing.

aboutBriefly.heading: Mark, briefly.
aboutBriefly.subnote: Cross-cultural path. Ontario-based. Operates one archive instead of seven scattered profiles.

selectedWork.heading: Things I shipped.
selectedWork.lede: A short loop of the projects worth showing — ready ones in front, drafts dimmed behind them.

frames.heading: How I got here.
frames.lede: A short visual journal — the rooms, the years, the moments that earned a slot.
frames.firstComputer: First computer — discovering you can make the screen do things.
frames.firstGame: First game project — wrote a story before I wrote the engine.
frames.moveToCanada: China to Canada — a long flight and a new accent.
frames.westernUniversity: Western University — software engineering, late labs, a city that taught me to ship.
frames.jdPower: J.D. Power — full-stack internship, real users, real tickets.
frames.firstFilm: First short film — handheld, mostly natural light.
frames.openingTheArchive: Opening the archive — this site, structured for the long run.

letsBuild.body: Something on your mind? Frontend systems, prototypes, creative tooling, or just a hello — whichever.

capabilities.title: Systems & surfaces
capabilities.lede: Five overlapping systems. Each is a real practice, not a buzzword.

production.title: Production engineering
production.description: Shipping Next.js / TypeScript / CI / observability work — the slow, careful kind that survives the second year.

interface.title: Interface systems
interface.description: Design systems, tokens, motion, Storybook, accessibility — interfaces you can read end-to-end.

game.title: Game feel & interaction
game.description: Prototypes, input systems, tuning. LAST KERNEL and a small workshop of interactive ideas.

ai.title: AI-assisted creative tools
ai.description: Agent workflows, content pipelines, internal tooling. Models treated as craft, not as a brand.

visual.title: Visual storytelling
visual.description: Photography, film, art direction, gallery curation — frames that earn their place.

Home.featuredDescription: A few production-grade case studies across web apps, AI tooling, and data visualisation.
Home.latestDescription: Short, dated, opinionated. Devlog plus systems notes — syndicated from dev.to.
Home.toolsDescription: A small, real personal stack — the things I actually use, with notes on why.

Home.mediaDescription: Video and process pages are presentationally ready — final posters and clips replace these frames later.
Home.closingStatement: One archive. Software, games, art, writing — built deliberately.

About.title: About
About.intro: Mark, Ontario. Writing code, building games, taking photos. The dashboard below is what he's reading, shipping, listening to, and where he's been.

bio.paragraph1: Mark is a software engineer from Ontario, Canada — by way of China. He builds web applications by day and tinkers with games, shaders, and black-and-white photography the rest of the time.
bio.paragraph2: Trained at Western University, sharpened by a full-stack co-op at J.D. Power. He treats portfolio surfaces like product surfaces: tight type, fast load, no fake metrics.
bio.paragraph3: When he isn't shipping he's usually somewhere with a camera. The travel log to the right is roughly chronological.

Meta.galleryDescription: Black-and-white photography, digital art, and contact sheets — visual archive by ZhenXiao Mark Yu.
Meta.resourcesDescription: Eighteen interactive tools — JSON formatter, contrast checker, JWT decoder, password generator, and more — that run in your browser. No login, no upload, no tracking.
Meta.contactDescription: Project inquiries and collaboration. Mailto and form fallback now, server-side provider later.
Meta.mediaDescription: Video and process archive — draft frames hold the layout while final clips and posters land.
Meta.shopDescription: Limited prints, posters, and small editions — the storefront opens once the first run is ready.
Meta.notesDescription: Short-form notes — design fragments, working ideas, and reading marginalia, kept terse and dated.

Auth.signInDescription: Optional. Lets you save things and leave comments. Nothing else.
Auth.signInTos: Stores a session cookie. No newsletter, no tracking pixels.
Auth.oauthFailed: That didn't take. Try again, or use another provider.
Auth.passwordHintEmpty: We'll email a one-time sign-in code. No password needed.
Auth.passwordHintFilled: Use the password you created for this account.
Auth.signUpHint: Use 8-72 characters. You can also connect Google, GitHub, or Discord later.
Auth.magicLinkSentBody: Sent a sign-in link to {email}. Usually arrives in a few seconds — tap it to finish, or paste the 6–8 digit code below if the link doesn't open.
Auth.magicLinkSentFooter: No email after a minute? Check spam.
Auth.confirmSentBody: Sent a confirmation link to {email}. Tap it to finish setting up your account.

magicLinkError.unconfigured: Auth is not configured on this deployment.
magicLinkError.invalidOtp: Enter the code from your email.
magicLinkError.otpFailed: Code didn't take. Request a new email.
magicLinkError.otpExpired: That code expired. Request a new email.
magicLinkError.sendFailed: Couldn't send the link. Try again in a moment.
magicLinkError.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.

passwordError.unconfigured: Auth is not configured on this deployment.
passwordError.invalidInput: Check the email and password — something's off.
passwordError.unconfirmedEmail: Confirm your email first — we sent a link when you signed up.
passwordError.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.

signUpError.unconfigured: Auth is not configured on this deployment.
signUpError.invalidInput: Check the email and password — something's off.
signUpError.userAlreadyExists: An account with that email already exists. Try signing in instead.
signUpError.signUpFailed: Couldn't create the account. Try again in a moment.
signUpError.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.

callbackError.unconfigured: Sign-in isn't configured on this deployment.
callbackError.exchangeFailed: Sign-in didn't complete. Request a new link and try again.
callbackError.missingCode: That link was incomplete. Request a fresh one.
callbackError.otpExpired: That sign-in link expired. Request a fresh one and use it right away.
callbackError.accessDenied: Sign-in was cancelled or the link expired. Request a new one.
callbackError.rateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
callbackError.duplicateIdentity: That GitHub account matches more than one existing account email. Sign in with Google or email first, then connect GitHub from Account settings.
callbackError.serverError: Supabase had a hiccup. Try again in a moment.
callbackError.generic: Something went wrong signing you in.

Auth.accountDeletedToast: Account deleted. Thanks for stopping by.
Auth.guestBrowseHint: You can browse the rest of the site without an account.

linkError.manualLinkingDisabled: Account linking is disabled in Supabase. Turn on manual linking and try again.
